basic_details.job_title: NISER Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NISER. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NISER Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemistry, M.Sc. in Chemistry with 4 years of R&D experience (minimum 55% marks)
qualification.details: PhD in Chemistry or M.Sc. in Chemistry with 4 years of R&D experience having at least 55 percent marks in MSc (Chemistry).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISER Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 25 May 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Chemistry or an M.Sc. in Chemistry with at least 4 years of R&D experience and a minimum of 55% marks in M.Sc.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Senior Project Associate position at NISER Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NISER Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for NISER Senior Project Associate recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar, Odisha, 752050.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Associate position is a contractual job.
